heading: Funding
label: 6906 Funding
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)690631:1607., , .Oct. 20, 1976Pub. L. 94–565, § 790 Stat. 2665The words “to the Secretary of the Interior” are added for clarity. The words “, That, notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter” and “in advance” are omitted as unnecessary.Provided

Amendments2019— substituted “fiscal year 2019” for “fiscal year 2018” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 116–62018— substituted “fiscal year 2018” for “each of fiscal years 2008 through 2014” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 115–1412014— substituted “2014” for “2013” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 113–792012— substituted “2013” for “2012” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 112–1412008— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “Necessary amounts may be appropriated to the Secretary of the Interior to carry out this chapter. Amounts are available only as provided in appropriation laws.”Pub. L. 110–343

Application of Section, , , provided that:Pub. L. 119–74, div. children.text: each county or other eligible unit of local government shall be entitled to payment under this chapter; and
sums shall be made available to the Secretary of the Interior for obligation or expenditure in accordance with this chapter.
